name: Royal Secret Agent
overview: During the Joseon Dynasty, the Secret Royal Inspectors are the eyes and ears of the king. They travel the provinces undercover and listen to the plight of the common people, investigating abuses and corruption of government officials.

trailers.title: [티저] 혼란의 시대 조선, 난세는 끝났다! "암행어사 출두요" [암행어사]
